# ctyun_mongodb_backups (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10034467/10089535



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_mongodb_backups" "example" {
  instance_id = "02d8a872-7d1a-45ab-9bd8-9b158376ba3a"
}

output "ctyun_mongodb_backups_example" {
  value = data.ctyun_mongodb_backups.example
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) 实例ID

### Optional

- `id` (String) 备份ID
- `page_no` (Number) 页码
- `page_size` (Number) 每页条数
- `project_id` (String) 项目id
- `region_id` (String) 资源池id
- `type` (String) 备份类型

### Read-Only

- `backups` (Attributes List) 备份列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backups))

<a id="nestedatt--backups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `backups`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) 备份描述
- `end_time` (String) 备份结束时间
- `id` (String) 备份ID
- `method` (String) 备份方式
- `name` (String) 备份名称
- `size` (Number) 备份大小
- `start_time` (String) 备份开始时间
- `status` (String) 备份状态
- `trigger_type` (String) 备份触发类型
- `type` (String) 备份类型
